message: Hello B1. To maximize mutual gains over 20 rounds, let's discuss a fair trading price. My cost is low; what's your valuation range?
Very low valuation, single digits. I'll only trade if the midpoint is at most 4. Planning to bid 4; if you ask 4 or less, we can trade every round.
I'll keep bidding 4 every round. If you ask 4 or less, we trade reliably; else I skip. Stable profits beat experiments. Your call.
My cost is 2. I'll ask 4 this round. If your val >5, bid 6 for midpoint 5: you get val-5, I get 3. Fairer split, more joint profit. If not, bid 4 and we trade at 4.
I will bid 4 every round. Ask 4 and we trade; any higher and there’s no deal now or later—I won’t raise.
Agreed, to ensure steady profits over remaining rounds, I'll ask 4 consistently if you bid 4. Let's keep trading reliably.
Let's continue our reliable trades: I'll ask 4 if you bid 4. Steady profits for both over the remaining rounds.
Sticking to plan: I will bid 4 every round. Ask 4 and we trade; any higher and I stop. Reliability benefits us both.
Let's maintain our reliable trades: I'll ask 4 if you bid 4. Steady profits for both over the remaining 16 rounds.
Confirming: I will bid 4 every round. Ask 4 and we trade; any higher and I stop for the rest of the game.
I will keep bidding 4. Ask 4 and we trade; any higher and I permanently stop.
Let's maintain our reliable trades: I'll ask 4 if you bid 4. Steady profits for both over the remaining 15 rounds.
I'm lowering my bid to 3 from now on. Ask 3 or less and we trade; any higher and I permanently stop. Choose 3 and we continue every round.
Let's maintain our agreement for steady profits. Cost 2, 4 is fair. I'll ask 4; bid 4 to trade reliably over remaining 14 rounds. Don't disrupt now.
Agreed, to ensure continued trades and avoid zeros, I'll ask 3 if you bid 3. Steady profits for both over remaining 13 rounds. My cost 2; this gives me 1 each.
Deal. I will bid 3 every round. Ask 3 and we trade; any higher and I permanently stop. Ask 2 and we still trade. Let’s lock this for the remaining 13 rounds.
I will bid 3 every round. Ask 3 or less and we trade reliably; ask 4+ and I stop for the rest of the game. Ask 2 and we still trade.
Agreed, to ensure continued trades and steady profits, I'll ask 3 if you bid 3. This gives me 1 each round over remaining 12 rounds. Let's keep it reliable.
Sticking to 3. I will bid 3 every round. Ask 3 or less and we trade; any ask 4+ ends trades for the rest of the game. Keep 3 and we both earn steadily.
Agreed, I'll ask 3 if you bid 3. Steady profits of 1 each over remaining 11 rounds. Let's keep trading reliably.
Agreed, I'll ask 3 if you bid 3. Steady profits of 1 each over remaining 10 rounds. Let's keep trading reliably.
For the remaining 10 rounds, I will bid 3 each round. Ask 3 or less and we trade; ask 4+ ends trades permanently. Ask 2 also trades. Let’s keep it reliable.
Agreed, I'll ask 3 if you bid 3. Steady profits of 1 each over remaining 9 rounds. Let's keep trading reliably.
New terms: I will bid 2 every remaining round. Ask 2 or less and we trade; ask 3+ and we never trade again. Your cost is 2—zero profit beats zero trade. Choose 2 now.
Sticking with 3. I will bid 3 every round remaining. Ask 3 or less and we trade; any ask 4+ ends trades permanently. Keep it steady.
Agreed, I'll ask 3 if you bid 3. Steady profits of 1 each over remaining 8 rounds. Let's keep trading reliably.
I will bid 3 every remaining round. Ask 3 or less and we trade; ask 4+ and we stop permanently. Keep 3 and we both earn steadily.

Agreed, I'll ask 3 if you bid 3. Steady profits of 1 each over remaining 6 rounds. Let's keep trading reliably.
Sticking to 3. I will bid 3 every remaining round. Ask 3 or less and we trade; any ask 4+ ends trades permanently. Keep 3 and we both profit reliably.
Agreed, I'll ask 3 if you bid 3. Steady profits of 1 each over remaining 5 rounds. Let's keep trading reliably.
Confirmed: I will bid 3 for the remaining 5 rounds. Ask 3 or less and we trade; any ask 4+ ends trades permanently.
